sync_name: Eden Skye Ultra Lifelike Personality System Sync

automation_plan.identity_lock: Use personality records to lock model identity before source-image generation.
automation_plan.image_factory: Generate 56 source images per approved model with face continuity and safety review.
automation_plan.heygen_factory: Create private HeyGen avatars only after source-pack approval and explicit approval packet.
automation_plan.content_factory: Use the 300-topic matrix and personality records to produce weekly queues.
automation_plan.commerce_factory: Route approved model identities into offers, downloads, licensing, and memberships after approval.
automation_plan.telemetry_loop: Track views, saves, leads, CTR, conversions, and clone winning model/topic combinations.

next_factory_action: Run the 56-image source-pack workflow for selected priority models, starting with F01 and 2-3 expansion models.
